title: Benchmark Leaderboard
description: Schema for benchmark JSON files in src/data/. Each file is an object with a single key matching the benchmark name (e.g. agentBench, webvoyager, gaia) whose value is an array of leaderboard entries.

systemName.description: Display name of the system, model, or agent.

organization.description: Organization or team that produced the result (e.g. 'Anthropic', 'Academic Research').

scoreDisplay.description: Human-readable score string as shown in the UI (e.g. '70.4%', '85.85%').

scoreValue.description: Numeric score used for sorting and comparison. Unit is benchmark-specific (typically a percentage).

sourceUrl.description: Citation URL: paper, blog post, or official leaderboard entry.

notesShort.description: One-sentence note summarizing the submission, methodology, or context.

isNew.description: Optional flag marking a recently added entry; absent means false.
